title: SSOT HR internal
description: projek magang OneData HR is an integrated HR management application built with **Laravel 12**, **Tailwind CSS v4**, and **Alpine.js** to support end-to-end people operations in one centralized platform. The system is designed to help HR teams and management run recruitment workflows, manage employee data, monitor performance, and generate operational reports with a consistent, role-based dashboard experience.
